classifications.phrase: wage and price pressures are subdued and are expected to remain so for some years
underlying inflation is expected to remain below 2 per cent over the next few years
The Board will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the…
The Board does not expect these conditions to be met until 2024 at the earliest

payload.rationale: The statement maintains an accommodative stance, emphasizing subdued inflation pressures, elevated unemployment, and a commitment to keep rates low until 2024, with no near-term tightening expected.
